tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def merged-prs
  (->> (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"})
       (filter :closes_linear)))

(def closing-ids
  (set (map :closes_linear merged-prs)))

(def linear-states
  (->> (linear_issues)
       (filter #(closing-ids (:id %)))
       (map #(select-keys % [:id :state]))))

(def not-done-ids
  (set (map :id (filter #(not= "done" (:state %)) linear-states))))

(…(+200)
